What it costs

2026 Price List

Straightforward pricing for cups, cakes, and all the extras that make it theirs.

Dessert cups

  • 250mlR20
  • 250ml with edible printR25
  • 350mlR30
  • 350ml with edible printR35

Ice cream cakes

  • 2LtR350
  • 3LtR450
  • 4LtR550
  • 5LtR650

Shapes

Ring, round, square, rectangular, heart, flower, numbers, and highball.

Flavours

Vanilla, chocolate, strawberry, cream soda, caramel, bubblegum, coffee, Amarula, banana — or any 2 flavours blended.

Mix-ins

Oreos, Flake, mixed berries, peppermint, caramel, Smarties, Jellytots, and M&Ms.

Extras

Edible photo prints, dipped berries, sugar flowers, chocolate figures and more — from R80.

Final quote confirmed on WhatsApp based on your theme, size and extras.

For busy parents

The classroom birthday, sorted

No rushing to the shops. No melting in the car. Order a class pack and we deliver pre-sliced ice cream cake — with spoons and napkins — before first break, at Witbank schools only.

School fundraiser

We give back 15% to your school

On every ice cream cake and cupcake order — no extra cost to you. Just quote your School Code Ref when you order on WhatsApp:

School's name + child's name & surname

We track it and pay your school back directly. The more parents that order, the more the school receives.

Get a class pack quote

We'll check your school's allergy & freezer rules and deliver at the perfect time. Delivery in Witbank only.

Easy as 1-2-3-4

How ordering works

Choose

Pick a theme and size — or tell us what the birthday kid loves.

WhatsApp us

Message at least 48 hours before the big day and we confirm everything.

Pay & relax

Secure your slot with payment. That's the hard part done.

We deliver

Fresh and frozen, right on time — party or school gate, Witbank only.

Start your order

Build it, then send it

Fill in a few details and we'll pop it straight into a WhatsApp message — no typing needed.

Price on request — we'll confirm on WhatsApp.

Delivery available in Witbank only. Outside Witbank? Choose collect.

Skip this if you're collecting.

Send my order on WhatsApp

We'll open WhatsApp with your details ready to send.
